allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
🎯 RECOVERED: Complete week of lost development work

This commit recovers all the sophisticated functionality that was built over the past week:

## 🔥 Major Features Added:

### Query Interface & Management
- TabbedQueryView: Multi-tab SQL query interface with resizable splits
- QueryInputSection: Advanced SQL editor with line numbers, syntax highlighting
- QueryResultsSection: Rich results display with messages/results tabs  
- QueryTab: Complete query execution with timing and state management

### Server & Connection Management
- ServerSwitcher: Cmd+Tab style server switching (macOS native)
- ServerOverview: Comprehensive server management interface
- Enhanced ConnectionSession management
- FinderStyleConnectionsList: Sophisticated connection browsing

### Advanced Data Display
- HighPerformanceGridView: Virtualized grid for large datasets
- Cell/row selection, column sorting, resizing
- EnhancedMessagesView: Rich query message display with severity levels

### Developer Experience
- SQLFormatter: Complete SQL syntax highlighting & formatting
- KeyboardShortcuts: Full keyboard shortcut management system
- Color+Extensions: Hex color support and utilities
- Platform compatibility layers for macOS/iOS

### UI/UX Enhancements  
- Custom SF Symbols for database objects
- JetBrains Mono font integration
- Drag & drop functionality
- Modern macOS Liquid Glass design elements

## 🛠️ Infrastructure
- Enhanced DatabaseClient with new object types (materialized views, functions, triggers)
- Comprehensive session management architecture
- Advanced state management with proper bindings
- Cross-platform compatibility utilities

This represents a significant advancement in the database client functionality with
professional-grade features for query management, data visualization, and user experience.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application """"System Events"""" to tell process """"Echo"""" to keystroke """","""" using command down')
